message.content:
Explore the exam system codebase thoroughly. I need to understand:

1. The project structure (backend: exam-system, frontend: exam-web)
2. How questions are currently managed - find Question entity/model, QuestionController, QuestionService
3. Find any existing "batch" or "import" related code for questions
4. Find the API design patterns (how controllers are structured, response types, etc.)
5. Find the frontend patterns for file upload and data management
6. Find the i18n files (en.json, zh.json) to understand existing translation keys
7. Look at existing admin pages and how they handle forms/modals

Search in D:\project\pt-gitlab\exams directory. Be very thorough - check controller, service, repository, entity, DTO classes for questions. Also check frontend hooks, routes, and components related to questions.
